summary: Showroom Tours feature fully tested. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend admin panel and customer-facing component verified working correctly. The feature is SEPARATE from Video Showroom and both sections work independently.

issues: Test data (TEST_Tonbridge, TEST_Gravesend) was visible during testing - cleaned up after tests

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for showroom tours videos, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Showroom Tours feature is fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints: PUT/GET /api/website-admin/homepage for showroom_tours_* fields (showroom_tours_visible, showroom_tours_title, showroom_tours_subtitle, showroom_tours_videos array). Deep merge ensures saving showroom_tours data doesn't overwrite video_showroom data. Frontend admin: Showroom Tours section in HomepageManager sidebar with visibility toggle, section title/subtitle inputs, Add Video button, video entries with title/description/video upload/thumbnail upload/individual toggle/delete/reorder controls, Show Preview button. Customer-facing: ShowroomTours component on homepage loads data dynamically from API, shows tabbed layout with large active video and clickable thumbnail tabs, respects showroom_tours_visible toggle.

backend_api: ✓ Deep merge preserves video_showroom data when saving showroom_tours
✓ showroom_tours_videos array structure verified (id, title, description, video_url, thumbnail_url, enabled)
✓ Public homepage endpoint returns showroom_tours data for customer-facing component
✓ Multiple videos can be saved with individual enabled/disabled states
✓ Both Video Showroom and Showroom Tours can be enabled independently
✓ Disabling one section doesn't affect the other
frontend_admin: ✓ 'Showroom Tours' appears as separate sidebar tab in Homepage Manager
✓ Clicking 'Showroom Tours' shows editor with all required elements
✓ Show Preview button (data-testid='toggle-tours-preview') present and functional
✓ Video entries show title, description, video upload, thumbnail upload, individual toggle, delete, reorder controls
✓ 'Video Showroom' tab still exists separately (sections are independent)
frontend_customer: ✓ Section title displays correctly from API ('Explore Our Showrooms')
✓ Section subtitle displays correctly from API ('Take a virtual tour of each location')
✓ Play button (data-testid='tours-play-btn') present on main video
✓ Thumbnail tabs are clickable and switch the active video
✓ Tab switching updates main video display dynamically
✓ Video Showroom section also exists on homepage (sections are independent)
